narration: A greedy algorithm makes the best local choice it can right now.
callout: It does not test every full future plan first.

narration: Best now depends on the problem: smallest helpful item, biggest gain, farthest reach, or safest current move.
decision: Greedy is a style of thinking, not one single formula.

predictionPrompt.prompt: What question does greedy keep asking?

choices.label: What is the best move right now?
choices.feedback: Correct. Greedy keeps making the best current move by the rule of the problem.

choices.label: What are all possible full answers?
choices.feedback: Not this one. That is not the main greedy mindset.

narration: Greedy works best when the local choice keeps the future in a good shape.
callout: That is why some problems fit greedy well and others do not.

reflectionPrompt.prompt: Why can a good local choice help the whole future in some problems?
